---
title: "XGboost"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

```{r}
# loadig packages
#install.packages("doParallel")
library(tidymodels)   
library(finetune)     
library(vip)          
library(xgboost)      
library(ranger)       
library(tidyverse)    
library(doParallel)   
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(recipes)
```

```{r weather_testing_and_training}


yield_train_raw <- read.csv(here("data", "final_data_weather_training.csv"))
yield_test_raw  <- read.csv(here("data", "final_data_weather_testing.csv"))


yield_model_data <- yield_train_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(yield_mg_ha),
         is.finite(yield_mg_ha)) %>%
  select(-any_of(c(
    "replicate",
    "block",
    "grain_moisture",
    "planted_doy",
    "harvested_doy",
    "hybrid"
  )))

```

```{r pre_processing}

set.seed(123)
yield_model_sample <- yield_model_data %>%
  slice_sample(n = min(10000, nrow(yield_model_data)))

```

```{r data_split}

#Create internal split for model evaluation
# Official test data has missing yield, so RMSE is checked here
set.seed(101)

yield_split <- initial_split(
  yield_model_sample,
  prop = 0.80,
  strata = yield_mg_ha
)

xgb_train <- training(yield_split)
xgb_valid <- testing(yield_split)
```

```{r checking_distribution}
ggplot(xgb_train, aes(x = yield_mg_ha)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)),
                 bins = 30,
                 fill = "skyblue",
                 color = "black") +
  geom_density(color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Yield in Training Data",
    x = "Yield (Mg/ha)",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r Prepocessing_and_feature_enginnering}

yield_xgb_recipe <- recipe(yield_mg_ha ~ ., data = xgb_train) %>%
  
  # Replace missing numeric values with median
  step_impute_median(all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  
  # Handle missing and new categorical levels
  step_unknown(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  step_novel(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  
  # Combine rare categorical levels
  step_other(all_nominal_predictors(), threshold = 0.001) %>%
  
  # Convert categorical predictors into dummy variables
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  
  # Remove predictors with zero variance
  step_zv(all_predictors())


```

```{r xgb_spec}

yield_xgb_model <- boost_tree(
  trees = tune(),
  tree_depth = tune(),
  min_n = tune(),
  learn_rate = tune(),
  sample_size = tune()
) %>%
  set_engine("xgboost") %>%
  set_mode("regression")

```

```{r combine_recipie_model}
yield_xgb_flow <- workflow() %>%
  add_recipe(yield_xgb_recipe) %>%
  add_model(yield_xgb_model)
```

```{r cross_validation_folds}

set.seed(123)

yield_cv <- vfold_cv(
  xgb_train,
  v = 5,
  strata = yield_mg_ha
)



```

```{r model_tuning}

set.seed(101)

yield_xgb_grid <- grid_latin_hypercube(
  tree_depth(range = c(2, 8)),
  min_n(range = c(5, 30)),
  learn_rate(range = c(-3, -1)),
  trees(range = c(100, 500)),
  sample_prop(range = c(0.6, 0.9)),
  size = 20
)
```

```{r xgb_ANOVA_racing}
set.seed(1111)

registerDoParallel(cores = parallel::detectCores() - 1)

yield_xgb_race <- tune_race_anova(
  yield_xgb_flow,
  resamples = yield_cv,
  grid = yield_xgb_grid,
  metrics = metric_set(rmse, rsq),
  control = control_race(save_pred = FALSE)
)

stopImplicitCluster()

yield_xgb_race$.metrics[[2]]

```

```{r best_rmse}
# Select best model by RMSE; low RMSE
show_best(yield_xgb_race, metric = "rmse")

xgb_best_params <- select_best(
  yield_xgb_race,
  metric = "rmse"
)

xgb_best_params

lowest_xgb_rmse <- collect_metrics(yield_xgb_race) %>%
  filter(.metric == "rmse") %>%
  arrange(mean) %>%
  slice(1)

lowest_xgb_rmse


```

```{r best r2}
# Select best model by R2; high R2

show_best(yield_xgb_race, metric = "rsq")

best_rsq_result <- collect_metrics(yield_xgb_race) %>%
  filter(.metric == "rsq") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean)) %>%
  slice(1)

best_rsq_result


```

```{r best_model_rmse}

best_xgb_params <- select_best(
  yield_xgb_race,
  metric = "rmse"
)

best_xgb_params

```

```{r final_flow}
# finalizing workflow using best rmse miel
yield_xgb_final_flow <- finalize_workflow(
  yield_xgb_flow,
  best_xgb_params)


```

```{r final_fit}

#internal training data and prediction of yeild
yield_xgb_fit <- yield_xgb_final_flow %>%
  fit(data = xgb_train)

yield_valid_pred <- predict(yield_xgb_fit, new_data = xgb_valid) %>%
  bind_cols(xgb_valid %>% select(yield_mg_ha))


yield_valid_metrics <- yield_valid_pred %>%
  metrics(
    truth = yield_mg_ha,
    estimate = .pred
  )

yield_valid_metrics

```

```{r}

#Predicted vs Observed plot is based on the TESTING (validation) dataset

xgb_rmse_value <- yield_valid_pred %>%
  rmse(truth = yield_mg_ha, estimate = .pred) %>%
  pull(.estimate)

xgb_rsq_value <- yield_valid_pred %>%
  rsq(truth = yield_mg_ha, estimate = .pred) %>%
  pull(.estimate)

ggplot(yield_valid_pred, aes(x = yield_mg_ha, y = .pred)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(yield_valid_pred$yield_mg_ha, na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(yield_valid_pred$.pred, na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "RMSE = ", round(xgb_rmse_value, 3),
      "\nR² = ", round(xgb_rsq_value, 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted vs Observed Yield - XGBoost",
    x = "Observed Yield (Mg/ha)",
    y = "Predicted Yield (Mg/ha)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r final_fit_fulltraingdata}
yield_xgb_full_fit <- yield_xgb_final_flow %>%
  fit(data = yield_model_data)



```

```{r main_testing_data}
yield_test_model <- yield_test_raw %>%
  select(-any_of(c(
    "replicate",
    "block",
    "grain_moisture",
    "planted_doy",
    "harvested_doy",
    "hybrid"
  )))


```

```{r final_yeild_predictionn}
official_xgb_pred <- predict(
  yield_xgb_full_fit,
  new_data = yield_test_model
)




```

```{r yeild_submission}
yield_submission_xgb <- yield_test_raw %>%
  bind_cols(official_xgb_pred) %>%
  mutate(yield_mg_ha = .pred) %>%
  select(year, site, hybrid, yield_mg_ha)


```

```{r}
write.csv(
  yield_submission_xgb,
  here("output", "testing_submission.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

```

```{r}

yield_submission_xgb %>%
  summarise(
    min_predicted_yield = min(yield_mg_ha, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_predicted_yield = max(yield_mg_ha, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_predicted_yield = mean(yield_mg_ha, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_unique_predictions = n_distinct(yield_mg_ha)
  )

```

```{r _saving for shiny app}

# Save objects for Shiny app
saveRDS(yield_model_data, here("output", "yield_model_data.rds"))
saveRDS(yield_valid_pred, here("output", "xgb_validation_predictions.rds"))
saveRDS(yield_xgb_fit, here("output", "final_xgb_model.rds"))
saveRDS(yield_xgb_full_fit, here("output", "final_xgb_full_model.rds"))

```
